title: Midas Capital - REKT
relevance_summary: Flash loan followed by reentrancy attack on a collateral type with known vulnerability

prevention.rule: Block any tx that borrows assets after updating collateral supply in the same transaction

summary: Midas Capital was exploited via a flash loan followed by a reentrancy attack on WMATIC-stMATIC Curve LP tokens, resulting in a loss of $660K. A guard could have blocked such transactions by preventing borrowing after updating collateral supply.
